title: BlackboardEntry.payload — *.run.complete nucleus shape
description: JSON Schema nucleus for the payload JSONB column when subject matches the *.run.complete family. Workers post a report under '<worker_name>.run.complete' at the end of a successful run cycle. The nucleus defines no required fields because specific shapes differ by worker (see worker-specific extensions in the blackboard subject enum). All *.run.complete payloads use additionalProperties:true to allow worker-specific fields. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1; ADR-011. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

duration_sec.description: Optional wall-clock duration of the run in seconds. Not required by the nucleus because some workers omit it; recommended for new workers.

completed_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the end of the run. Provided by some workers (e.g. RepoCrawlerWorker) alongside the cycle stats.
